{"id":"project-LICHEN-c5v3","title":"SosResource.render_put accepts negative timestamps","description":"File: python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py:435-456

Even with type validation for 't', negative timestamps would be accepted:
```python
t = body.get('t')
...
self.activate(eui64, t if t is not None else 0.0)
```

A negative timestamp like -1.0 is semantically invalid for 'time of SOS activation' but would be stored and propagated to observers.

Similarly, PresenceResource.seen() at line 334-352 and purge_older_than() at line 363-373 accept any float for timestamps, including negative values.

Fix: Validate timestamp is non-negative:
```python
if t is not None and (not isinstance(t, (int, float)) or t < 0):
    return Message(code=aiocoap.BAD_REQUEST)
```","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:19:04.047396Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:19:04.047441Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-c5v3","title":"SosResource.render_put accepts negative timestamps","description":"File: python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py:435-456

Even with type validation for 't', negative timestamps would be accepted:
```python
t = body.get('t')
...
self.activate(eui64, t if t is not None else 0.0)
```

A negative timestamp like -1.0 is semantically invalid for 'time of SOS activation' but would be stored and propagated to observers.

Similarly, PresenceResource.seen() at line 334-352 and purge_older_than() at line 363-373 accept any float for timestamps, including negative values.

Fix: Validate timestamp is non-negative:
```python
if t is not None and (not isinstance(t, (int, float)) or t < 0):
    return Message(code=aiocoap.BAD_REQUEST)
```","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:19:04.047396Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-23T03:43:33.116993236Z","started_at":"2026-07-23T03:43:33.116993236Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-23T03:48:33.116993236Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-23T03:43:33.116993236Z"}
